name: Almost Better Than Sex Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper
Preparation Time: 0:35
Heat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch pan.
Prepare the cake mix according to package instructions; pour into the prepared pan. After about 10 minutes of baking, sprinkle with chocolate chips. Continue baking until the cake is done. While the cake is still hot, use the handle of a wooden spoon to poke holes in it. Pour sweetened condensed milk over the cake and let cool. Top with caramel sauce, then whipped topping. Sprinkle with crushed candy bars.
